title: Nexus ListOrchestrationSessionsQuery
description: Query parameters for GET /v1/local/orchestration/sessions (cursor-based pagination + sort, F-F1).

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous response's `pagination.next_cursor`.

sort.description: Comma-separated sort terms. Allowed keys: `session_id` (default), `creator_id`, `preset_id`, `status`. Prefix `-` for descending.
